Default Prove-Up In Scd.
Off Calendar Feb-09-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled for Default Prove-Up Hearing this day.
Dept. 218, Comm. Sue Kaplan, Clerk: S. Ravinantapricha, CSR: Diana Padilla.
Herman Franck, Esq. for Plaintiff: Thomas H. Lutge, also present, was sworn and examined.
After hearing the evidence presented, the Court rules in favor of the Plaintiff and against the Defaulted Defendant: David Christensen.
Matter submitted and taken under submission.
Propose Judgement received in court.
